from bullet import Bullet
from map import Obstacle

# 创建测试对象

bullet = Bullet\(280, 120, 1, 'player'\)  # RIGHT=1

print\(f'Obstacle rect: {obstacle.get_rect\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Bullet rect: {bullet.rect}'\)
print\(f'Bullet pos: \({bullet.x}, {bullet.y}\)'\)

bullet.update\(\)
print\(f'After update - Bullet pos: \({bullet.x}, {bullet.y}\)'\)
print\(f'After update - Bullet rect: {bullet.rect}'\)

# 检查碰撞
print\(f'Collides: {bullet.collide_with_rect\(obstacle.get_rect\(\)\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from bullet import Bullet
from map import Obstacle
from config import RIGHT

# 创建测试对象 - 让子弹直接对着障碍物
obstacle = Obstacle\(300, 100, 40, 40, 'brick'\)
bullet = Bullet\(250, 120, RIGHT, 'player'\)  # 在障碍物左边

# 多次更新让子弹飞到障碍物
for i in range\(10\):
    bullet.update\(\)
    print\(f'Update {i}: Bullet pos=\({bullet.x}, {bullet.y}\), rect={bullet.rect}, collides={bullet.collide_with_rect\(obstacle.get_rect\(\)\)}'\)
    if bullet.collide_with_rect\(obstacle.get_rect\(\)\):
        break
")

Initial commit: Tank Battle Game

Features:
- Beautiful pixel-style graphics with animations
- Classic tank battle controls \(WASD/Arrow keys + Space\)
- Multiple enemy types \(Normal, Fast, Heavy\)
- Various terrain types \(Brick, Steel, Water, Grass\)

- Base protection gameplay

- W/Up: Move up
- S/Down: Move down
- A/Left: Move left
- D/Right: Move right
- Space: Shoot
- ESC/P: Pause
